prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 8431→8389→8557→9486→10511，整体呈逐年后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 1954 名；2025 年基准约 10511 名，为近 5 年最高（位次数字最大）；该校在江西省物理类计划 2021–2022 年均为 270 人，2023 年 273 人，2024 年 252 人，2025 年 265 人；2026 年计划 264 人，较 2025 年减少 1 人，属微幅缩招，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 48–55 名（2025 年第 48 名，2026 年第 54 名），稳居全国理工类高校前列，办学实力受广泛认可；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区周边异常生物活动），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 98（一般），短视频曝光量处于同类高校中下游，未见明显升温信号；材料科学与工程 A、交通运输工程 A-、机械工程 A-，均为传统工科强项，与该校物理类招生专业（材料类、机械类、交通运输类、计算机类、电子信息类等）高度匹配，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，利好以工科见长的武汉理工大学；江西省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 47.49 万，物理类估算约 26.79 万，较 2025 年（26.64 万）微增约 0.55%，竞争略有加剧；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区核心城市，对江西考生具有较好的地理邻近性和就业辐射力；该校在江西省招生占比约 2.5%–3.5%，属中等偏上水平，地域偏好稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划微幅缩招、本省物理类考生小幅增加以及工科专业热度持续等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 10511 名基础上竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 10507 名，区间 10007–11007 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、智能科学与技术、通信工程）
- 自动化类（电气工程及其自动化、自动化、机器人工程）
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（车辆）（车辆工程、能源与动力工程、储能科学与工程）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 数学类（信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 材料类（材料科学与工程、无机非金属材料工程、高分子材料与工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 化工与制药类（含生物方向）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、采矿工程、矿物加工工程）
- 物流管理与工程类（物流管理、物流工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 10007–11007 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（10000 名以内）可重点冲击计算机类、电子信息类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（11000 名附近）应以三档专业保底，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8431→8389→8557→9486→10511, showing a gradual backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1954 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 10511, the highest in the last 5 years (largest ranking number); the university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province was 270 in 2021–2022, 273 in 2023, 252 in 2024, and 265 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 264, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, a slight reduction with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking in recent years is around 48–55 (48th in 2025, 54th in 2026), firmly among the top national science and engineering universities, with widely recognized academic strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (abnormal biological activity around Nanhu Campus), which may mildly suppress some candidates' application intentions; Douyin popularity ranking is 98 (average), with short video exposure at a mid-to-low level among similar universities, showing no clear signs of increased attention; Materials Science and Engineering is rated A, Transportation Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, all traditional engineering strengths, highly matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Materials, Mechanical, Transportation, Computer, Electronic Information, etc.), providing sustained appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, benefiting Wuhan University of Technology, known for its engineering strengths; the total number of Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 474,900, with Physics Category estimated at about 267,900, a slight increase of about 0.55% compared to 2025 (266,400), slightly intensifying competition; Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a core city in the central region, offering good geographical proximity and employment radiation for Jiangxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 2.5%–3.5%, above average, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the small increase in Physics Category candidates in the province, and the sustained popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will face slightly intensified competition based on the 2025 baseline of 10511; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10507, with a range of 10007–11007.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Automation Category (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Category (Vehicle) (Vehicle Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Mathematics Category (Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Materials Category (Materials Science and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering Category (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category (including Biology direction)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (Environmental Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Logistics Management and Engineering Category (Logistics Management, Logistics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10007–11007, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 10000), focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer and Electronic Information; for rankings near the upper limit (around 11000), use Tier 3 majors as safety to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类（含文科）最低位次约 1897→2151→1994→2685→2621，整体波动上行，2024 年因新高考改革出现较大后移（2685），2025 年略回升至 2621；2025 年基准约 2621 名；该校在江西省历史类计划 2021–2022 年均为 21 人，2023 年 20 人，2024 年 34 人，2025 年 33 人；2026 年计划 42 人，较 2025 年增加 9 人（扩招约 27.3%），为近 5 年最大扩招幅度，将显著增加录取机会。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名约第 48–55 名，虽以理工见长，但作为综合性大学对文科考生仍具品牌吸引力；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），抖音热度排名第 98（一般），对文科考生报考意愿影响有限；未见明显投档断档记录；该校文科招生专业涉及经济学类、法学类、工商管理类、新闻传播学类、外国语言文学类 等，虽非该校 A 类学科核心领域，但依托 211 平台仍具竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学类社会热度推荐（考公优势），汉语言/中文推荐，新闻传播明显劝退，工商管理分化观望；江西省 2026 年历史类考生估算约 20.70 万，较 2025 年（20.61 万）微增约 0.46%，竞争基本持平；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，距江西较近，交通便利，对江西文科考生有较好的地域吸引力；该校在江西省文科招生计划近年持续增 加，体现对江西生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年历史类计划大幅扩招（+27.3%）这一最核心利好因素、考生总数微增、学校品牌效应稳定等，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年（2621 名）明显后移（位次数字增大，录取机会增加）；预测最低位次约 3020 名，区间 2520–3520 名。

一档（最难进）

- 经济学类（经济学、金融学）
- 网络与新媒体。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 2520–3520 名内，2026 年大幅扩招背景下录取机会显著增加；建议以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（2500 名以内）可重点冲击法学类、经济学类等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（3500 名附近）应以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1897→2151→1994→2685→2621, showing an overall upward fluctuation. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant backward shift (2685), and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 2621; the 2025 baseline is about 2621. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi for History Category was 21 students in both 2021 and 2022, 20 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and 33 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 42 students, an increase of 9 students compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 27.3%), the largest expansion in the past 5 years, which will significantly increase admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 48th to 55th on the Soft Science main ranking. Although it excels in science and engineering, as a comprehensive university it still holds brand appeal for liberal arts students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 98 (average), which has limited impact on liberal arts students' willingness to apply. No significant admission gaps have been recorded. The university's liberal arts enrollment majors include Economics, Law, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, and Foreign Languages and Literature. Although these are not the core A-class disciplines of the university, they remain competitive due to the 211 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (advantageous for civil service exams), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and Business Administration is divided with a wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Jiangxi is about 207,000, a slight increase of about 0.46% compared to 2025 (206,100), making competition basically flat. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, close to Jiangxi with convenient transportation, offering good regional appeal to Jiangxi liberal arts students. The university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Jiangxi has been increasing in recent years, reflecting its emphasis on Jiangxi students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the most core favorable factor of a significant expansion in the 2026 History Category plan (+27.3%), a slight increase in the total number of examinees, and a stable brand effect of the university, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward (ranking number increases, admission opportunities increase) compared to 2025 (2621). The predicted minimum ranking is about 3020, with a range of 2520 to 3520.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (Law, Intellectual Property, Social Work (Digital Social Governance))
- Economics (Economics, Finance)
- Network and New Media.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration (Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Accounting, Entrepreneurship Management)
- Ideological and Political Education.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, French).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With a ranking within the predicted range of 2520 to 3520, admission opportunities significantly increase under the 2026 expansion background. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2500), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Law and Economics. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 3500), use Tier 3 majors as safety options.
